author: carvah
description: Create a beautiful and intuitive directory tree using Markdown-oriented code style using tabs, spaces and enters.
name: Markdown Tree

releases.author: carvah
releases.description:
- Added the ability to convert plain text and parse the spaces, tabs and enters and transform into a fancy directory-like folder structure in Obsidian MD.
- Added settings tab to configure the way the folder structure is rendered.
